ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "login" TEXT /* Login name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed and salted) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passwords" (
  "password_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each password */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the password belongs to */,
  "crypted_password" TEXT /* Hashed password */,
  "password_salt" TEXT /* Salt used to hash the password */,
  "password_version" INTEGER /* Version of the password for tracking changes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the password was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last password update */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Expiration date of the password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("password_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passwords_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the session belongs to */,
  "session_token" TEXT /* Session token */,
  "last_request_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last request */,
  "current_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the current login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the session is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the session was created */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Expiration date of the session */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the session was initiated */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client initiating the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "login_activity" (
  "login_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each login event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the login event belongs to */,
  "login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the login */,
  "logout_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the logout */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the login was initiated */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client initiating the login */,
  "login_from" TEXT /* Location or device from which the login was initiated */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the login was successful */,
  "failed_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed attempts before successful login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("login_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_login_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ips" (
  "ip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IP address */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the IP address belongs to */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address */,
  "last_used_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last use */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the IP address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the IP address */,
  "is_trusted" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the IP is trusted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ips_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_agents" (
  "user_agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user agent */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the user agent belongs to */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string */,
  "last_used_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last use */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform of the user agent */,
  "browser" TEXT /* Browser of the user agent */,
  "is_mobile" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user agent is from a mobile device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_agents_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "persistence_tokens" (
  "persistence_token_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each persistence token */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the persistence token belongs to */,
  "persistence_token" TEXT /* Persistence token */,
  "last_used_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last use */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Expiration date of the persistence token */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("persistence_token_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_persistence_tokens_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "single_access_tokens" (
  "single_access_token_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each single access token */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the single access token belongs to */,
  "single_access_token" TEXT /* Single access token */,
  "last_used_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last use */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Expiration date of the single access token */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("single_access_token_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_single_access_tokens_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_keys" (
  "api_key_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API key */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the API key belongs to */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key */,
  "last_used_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last use */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or name of the API key */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the API key is active */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Expiration date of the API key */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("api_key_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_keys_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "oauth_tokens" (
  "oauth_token_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each OAuth token */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the OAuth token belongs to */,
  "oauth_token" TEXT /* OAuth token */,
  "last_used_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last use */,
  "provider" TEXT /* OAuth provider */,
  "scopes" TEXT /* Scopes granted by the OAuth provider */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Expiration date of the OAuth token */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("oauth_token_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_oauth_tokens_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "open_id_connects" (
  "open_id_connect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each OpenID Connect */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the OpenID Connect belongs to */,
  "open_id_connect" TEXT /* OpenID Connect information */,
  "last_used_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last use */,
  "provider" TEXT /* OpenID Connect provider */,
  "scopes" TEXT /* Scopes granted by the OpenID Connect provider */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Expiration date of the OpenID Connect token */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("open_id_connect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_open_id_connects_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "saml_assertions" (
  "saml_assertion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SAML assertion */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the SAML assertion belongs to */,
  "saml_assertion" TEXT /* SAML assertion */,
  "last_used_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last use */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* Issuer of the SAML assertion */,
  "audience" TEXT /* Audience of the SAML assertion */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Expiration date of the SAML assertion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("saml_assertion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_saml_assertions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_tokens" (
  "access_token_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access token */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the access token belongs to */,
  "access_token" TEXT /* Access token */,
  "last_used_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last use */,
  "token_type" TEXT /* Type of access token */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Expiration date of the access token */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_token_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_tokens_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "refresh_tokens" (
  "refresh_token_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each refresh token */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the refresh token belongs to */,
  "refresh_token" TEXT /* Refresh token */,
  "last_used_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last use */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Expiration date of the refresh token */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("refresh_token_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_refresh_tokens_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "id_tokens" (
  "id_token_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ID token */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the ID token belongs to */,
  "id_token" TEXT /* ID token */,
  "last_used_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last use */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* Issuer of the ID token */,
  "audience" TEXT /* Audience of the ID token */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Expiration date of the ID token */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id_token_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_id_tokens_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
